digest.greeting: Tuesday, June 23, Jean. Today is anchored by the Jessica and Jhara 1:1s, a protected midday block, Mar and Janet syncs, LeadUp Module 2, and the 4:00 PM intake workflow meeting. Outlook shows 8 calendar blocks, 1 carried-over priority, 1 reminder, and 1 urgent item. The day should stay focused on converting the KPI set into SMART goals, clarifying who owns Vendors/TRACE-adjacent routing before it creates confusion, deciding Mar Garcia's June 26 leave request, and using the intake workflow meeting to lock the Pending IT Review path. Teams broad-thread discovery returned a Microsoft Graph 403, so Teams context is based on readable unread chats and targeted search/fetch results.

items.label: Turn the KPI set into SMART goals
items.detail: This is the one meaningful carry-over still open in state and still marked with a priority reaction. Keep it close to the EPMO storyline so the KPI set becomes a small group of leadership-ready goals rather than a loose metric list.

items.label: Update Jorge's project sheet for Jill's portfolio
items.detail: Manual reminder from last night: update the project sheet for Jorge tied to Jill's portfolio. This should pair well with today's intake workflow and ownership conversations.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The day has two morning 1:1s, a 12:00 PM focus block, and a compressed 2:00-4:30 PM run of project, workload, leadership training, and intake workflow conversations.

items.label: 1:1 Jessica and Jean
items.detail: Useful checkpoint for any Case Change, process-map, or Tuesday deliverable follow-up that still needs a clean next step.

items.label: 1:1 Jhara & Jean
items.detail: Agenda names portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Use this to pressure-test SLQ, active PM work, and any ownership confusion from the EPMO/TRACE discussions.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Best focus window for SMART-goal drafting, Jorge's project sheet, or preparing the intake workflow questions before the afternoon meeting stack.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Good place to clarify who Mar should answer to for Vendors and whether Jorge's movement on that work needs direction before it drifts.

items.label: bi-weekly sync (J & J)
items.detail: Janet's workload/challenges/wins/goals sync. Use it to align on project routing, converted-project notifications, and what should land in Pending IT Review.

items.label: LeadUp Module 2: Team Development
items.detail: Leadership-training block focused on moving from diagnosis to team development. It sits between Janet's sync and the intake workflow meeting.

items.label: Intakes (Department projects/BA Request) workflow
items.detail: Janet's invite says the group will review the proposed workflow for routing department projects and BA requests through the Pending IT Review path. This is the day's clearest decision forum.

items.label: Clarify who owns Vendors and TRACE-adjacent routing
items.detail: Mar asked overnight who will lead the Vendors project because Jorge appears to be moving ahead and she does not know who she should answer to. Pair that with the EPMO Leadership thread on TRACE 2.0 placement so Mar, Jorge, Sara, and Janet are not operating from different routing assumptions.

items.label: Review Mar Garcia's June 26 leave request
items.detail: Rippling shows Mar requested leave for Friday, June 26. Decide or route the approval so coverage expectations are clear before the end of the week.

items.label: Prepare the intake workflow decision path
items.detail: For the 4:00 PM meeting, come ready to separate department projects, BA requests, Pending IT Review intake, and deferred/prioritization logic. The TRACE 2.0 discussion is a useful example to pressure-test the workflow.

items.label: Check the AOS Rejection downstream task plan
items.detail: Maria's Asana status update says initiation is complete and on track, but the next steps are to populate and activate Execution, Planning, Closing, and Monitoring tasks and assign owners. Confirm whether that needs Jean's direction or just monitoring.

items.label: TRACE taskset testing found specific issues
items.detail: Yuri reported that FIX and CHANGE tasksets tested well, but several COR tasksets have no tasks and one Signature & Forms taskset is showing the wrong Interview tasks. Jean asked Yuri to notify IT and the BA in the DevOps ticket; Yuri replied that it was already done, so this is a follow-up check rather than a new assignment.

items.label: Confirm whether the Toggl restriction is team-wide
items.detail: Yuri asked the Phase 2 team whether a Toggl restriction is affecting everyone, and Santiago and Andrea indicated they may be seeing the same issue. If time tracking matters this week, confirm whether this needs a team-level fix or a simple workaround.

items.label: Camilo Vejarano is out through June 26
items.detail: Camilo's response to the Tudo Bem meeting says he is on vacation from June 16 to June 26. Avoid assigning near-term follow-up that depends on him this week.

items.label: 1:1 David & Jean
items.detail: Use this for CoE, TRACE, or taskset follow-through if Yuri's DevOps/BA note needs escalation.

items.label: 1:1 Carolina and Jean
items.detail: Department support/project-review conversation. Good place to identify any new intake or support asks.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protect this for SMART-goal cleanup, project-sheet updates, or follow-through from today's intake workflow meeting.

items.label: Jorge|Jean TM's transition plan
items.detail: Jorge's invite asks for schedules, approved time off, performance feedback, and skills/experience context before team-member transition.

items.label: 1:1 Yuri & Jean
items.detail: Follow-up point for TRACE taskset issues, DevOps ticket status, and any IT/BA dependency from Monday's testing.

items.label: LeadUp Module 2
items.detail: Second LeadUp session appears on tomorrow's calendar, followed by a 4:00 PM CoE Biweekly Touchpoint that overlaps the focus-time block.

solicitar a TMs los numeros de sus tickets de IT relacionados a Venn

Actualizar hoja de proyectos para Jorge (portafolio de Jill)
